sentence: 她大学主修国际贸易专业。
pinyin: Tā dàxué zhǔxiū guójì màoyì zhuānyè.
english: She majored in international trade at university.

sentence: 他花了三年时间写完这部长篇小说。
pinyin: Tā huāle sān nián shíjiān xiě wán zhè bù chángpiān xiǎoshuō.
english: It took him three years to finish writing this novel.

sentence: 你把那个图标拖到桌面上就行了。
pinyin: Nǐ bǎ nàge túbiāo tuō dào zhuōmiàn shàng jiù xíng le.
english: Just drag that icon onto the desktop.

pinyin: Tā kào bǎitān mài xiǎochī yíngshēng.
english: He earns a living by running a snack stall.

sentence: 周末他喜欢去山里跑越野。
pinyin: Zhōumò tā xǐhuān qù shānlǐ pǎo yuèyě.
english: On weekends he likes to go trail running in the mountains.
